name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
<!-- What workflow is painful today? Concrete examples are most useful. -->


**Proposed solution**
<!-- What CLI flag, key-binding, output, or behaviour would make it work? -->


**Alternatives you considered**


**Comparable feature in another tool?**

**Are you willing to send a PR?**
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Yes, with guidance
